research-query-gate.summary: Added deterministic research-query safety gate and policy/data-boundary binding.

zero-trust-redteam.summary: Expanded fail-closed red-team checks for research-query exfiltration attempts.

project-dag-regression.summary: Project DAG regression suite passed with research authorization binding.

demo-receipt.summary: Demo receipt written by the Tau research-query auth binding slice.

commands_run: uv run ruff check src/tau_coding/research_query_gate.py src/tau_coding/zero_trust_redteam.py src/tau_coding/project_dag.py tests/test_research_query_gate.py tests/test_zero_trust_redteam.py tests/test_project_dag.py
uv run pytest tests/test_research_query_gate.py tests/test_zero_trust_redteam.py tests/test_project_dag.py -q

proves: Static UI fixture can represent a Tau DAG contract and receipt as React Flow evidence.
Research-query gate slice had deterministic local proof before fixture capture.
This page displays receipt-backed statuses from fixture artifacts instead of invented live state.
does_not_prove: Live Tau DAG execution from the browser.
